name: yanjing
description: 衍境 · 互动影游智能体创作系统（本地复刻版）

scripts.test: npm run test:engine && npm run test:creator && npm run test:content && npm run test:assets && npm run test:ui && npm run test:smoke
scripts.test:engine: node 源码/播放器/剧情引擎/引擎自测.mjs
scripts.test:creator: node 源码/创作台/创作台自测.mjs
scripts.test:content: node 源码/播放器/剧情引擎/第九席内容自测.mjs
scripts.test:assets: node 源码/公共工具/资源自测.mjs
scripts.test:ui: node 源码/播放器/界面组件/心界组件自测.mjs
scripts.test:smoke: node 源码/播放器/播放器壳层自测.mjs
scripts.test:player: npm run test:ui && npm run test:smoke
scripts.素材爬取: node 源码/公共工具/素材爬取.mjs
